member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.ImageFormat
member.summary: Exported image file format

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.ImageFormat.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown, no preferred file format

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.ImageFormat.Jpg
member.summary: Jpeg file format

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.ImageFormat.Png
member.summary: PNG (Portable Network Graphics) file format

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.GltfFormat
member.summary: glTF format

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.GltfFormat.Json
member.summary: JSON-based glTF (.gltf file extension)

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.GltfFormat.Binary
member.summary: glTF-binary (.glb file extension)

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.ImageDestination
member.summary: Destination for image files

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.ImageDestination.Automatic
member.summary: Automatic decision. Main buffer for glTF-binary, separate files for JSON-based glTFs.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.ImageDestination.MainBuffer
member.summary: Embeds images in main buffer

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.ImageDestination.SeparateFile
member.summary: Saves images as separate files relative to glTF file

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.FileConflictResolution
member.summary: Resolutions to existing file conflicts

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.FileConflictResolution.Abort
member.summary: Abort and keep existing files

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.FileConflictResolution.Overwrite
member.summary: Replace existing files with newly created ones

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.Compression
member.summary: glTF compression method.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.Compression.Uncompressed
member.summary: No compression

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.Compression.MeshOpt
member.summary: Meshopt compression via

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.Compression.Draco
member.summary: Draco 3D Data compression via

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings
member.summary: glTF export settings

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings.Format
member.summary: Export to JSON-based or binary format glTF files

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings.LightIntensityFactor
member.summary: Light intensity values are multiplied by this factor.

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings.ComponentMask
member.summary: Component type flags to include or exclude components from export based on type.

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings.Compression
member.summary: Type of compression to apply

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings.DracoSettings
member.summary: Draco compression export settings

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings.Deterministic
member.summary: If true, the export results will not differ on repeated exports. This comes at the cost of potentially longer export times on scenes with multiple, large meshes. This can be a requirement for certain asset pipelines or automated tests.

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings.PreservedVertexAttributes
member.summary: Controls which vertex attributes are preserved during export, regardless whether they are used/referenced or not. By default, unused attributes are discarded.

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings.JpgQuality
member.summary: [1-100] quality for JPG images

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase
member.summary: Wrapper to export a glTF image from one or more Unity textures

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase.FileName
member.summary: Exported texture's file name

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase.MimeType
member.summary: Exported texture's mime type

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase.FilterMode
member.summary: Source texture's filter mode

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase.WrapModeU
member.summary: Source texture's wrap mode (U direction)

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase.WrapModeV
member.summary: Source texture's wrap mode (V direction)

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase.Write(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes image file
member.param: If true, existing files will be overwritten
member.returns: True if writing succeeded, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase.GetData
member.summary: Returns the exported and encoded texture data
member.returns: Encoded texture data.

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase.JpgQuality
member.summary: [1-100] quality for JPG images

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase.EncodeTexture(UnityEngine.Texture2D,GLTFast.Export.ImageFormat,System.Int32,System.Boolean,UnityEngine.Material)
member.summary: Encodes the export texture
member.param: True if the texture has an alpha channel
member.returns: Encoded texture data

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.m_Texture
member.summary: Main source texture

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.m_ImageFormat
member.summary: Preferred image format

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.m_AssetPath
member.summary: Asset's path

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.ValidAssetPath
member.summary: True if is a valid path

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.#ctor(UnityEngine.Texture2D,GLTFast.Export.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Default constructor

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.ImageFormat
member.summary: Final export imageFormat

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.FileExtension
member.summary: File extension according to image format

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.GenerateTexture(System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Encodes the export texture
member.returns: True if encoding succeeded, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.GetHashCode
member.summary: Default hash function.
member.returns: A hash code for the current object.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether two object instances are equal.
member.param: The object to compare with the current object.
member.returns: true if the specified object is equal to the current object; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ImageExport.LoadBlitMaterial(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a blit material from a shader name
member.param: Name of the shader to be used (without the "Hidden/" prefix)
member.returns: Blit material with requested Shader or null, if Shader wasn't found

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.GltfMaterialExporter
member.summary: Converts Unity Materials that use a glTFast shader to glTF materials

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.GltfMaterialExporter.GetAlphaMode(UnityEngine.Material)
member.summary: Extracts the glTF alpha mode from a Unity material.
member.returns: glTF alpha mode.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.GltfMaterialExporter.GetAlphaCutoff(UnityEngine.Material)
member.summary: Returns that material's alpha cutoff threshold.
member.returns: Alpha cutoff threshold value.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.GltfMaterialExporter.IsDoubleSided(UnityEngine.Material)
member.summary: Indicates whether (back-face) culling should be disabled.
member.returns: True if material does not do back-face culling. False otherwise.

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.GltfBuiltInShaderMaterialExporter
member.summary: Converts Unity Materials that use a glTFast Built-In shader to glTF materials

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.MetaMaterialExportShaderGraphs`2
member.summary: Picks a fitting material exporter, based on the used shader.
member.typeparam: Fallback material exporter for Unity Standard/Lit shaders.
Material exporter for glTFast shader graphs.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.TextureComparer.Equals(GLTFast.Schema.TextureBase,GLTFast.Schema.TextureBase)
member.summary: Compares two textures based on their source and sampler only.
member.returns: True if textures have identical source and sampler, false otherwise.

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExportSettings
member.summary: GameObject hierarchies related glTF export settings

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExportSettings.OnlyActiveInHierarchy
member.summary: When true, only GameObjects that are active (in a hierarchy) are exported

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExportSettings.DisabledComponents
member.summary: When true, components will get exported regardless whether they're enabled or not.

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExportSettings.LayerMask
member.summary: Only GameObjects on layers contained in this mask are going to get exported.

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExport
member.summary: Provides the default material export

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExport.GetDefaultMaterialExport
member.summary: Provides the default material exporter
member.returns: Default material export
member.exception: Is thrown when the default material export couldn't be determined based on the current render pipeline.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExport.AddImageExport(GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable,GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Adds an ImageExport to the glTF. No conversions or channel swizzling
member.param: glTF to add the image to.
member.returns: True if the texture was added, false otherwise.

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.GltfWriter
member.summary: Provides glTF export independent of workflow (GameObjects/Entities)

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.GltfWriter.#ctor(GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings,GLTFast.IDeferAgent,GLTFast.Logging.ICodeLogger)
member.summary: Provides glTF export independent of workflow (GameObjects/Entities)
member.param: Defer agent (); decides when/if to preempt export to preserve a stable frame rate.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.GltfWriter.WriteBufferViewToBuffer(Unity.Collections.NativeArray{System.Byte},GLTFast.Schema.BufferViewTarget,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes the given data to the main buffer, creates a bufferView and returns its index
member.param: The byte size of an element. Provide it, if it cannot be inferred from the accessor
member.returns: Buffer view index

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.VertexAttributeUsage
member.summary: Vertex attribute mask.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.VertexAttributeUsage.None
member.summary: No attribute.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.VertexAttributeUsage.TwoTexCoords
member.summary: The first two texture coordinate channels.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.VertexAttributeUsage.AllTexCoords
member.summary: All eight texture coordinate channels.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.VertexAttributeUsage.Skinning
member.summary: Blend indices and weights, required for skinning/morph targets.

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.VertexAttributeUsageExtension
member.summary: Extension methods for .

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.VertexAttributeUsageExtension.ToVertexAttributeUsage(UnityEngine.Rendering.VertexAttribute)
member.summary: Converts a to a mask with corresponding flag enabled.
member.returns: Vertex attribute mask with corresponding flag enabled.
member.exception: Thrown when an unknown VertexAttribute is detected.

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.IMaterialExport
member.summary: Converts a Unity Material into a glTF material

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IMaterialExport.ConvertMaterial(UnityEngine.Material,GLTFast.Schema.Material@,GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable,GLTFast.Logging.ICodeLogger)
member.summary: Converts a Unity material to a glTF material.
member.param: Associated IGltfWriter. Is used for adding images and textures.
member.returns: True if no errors occured, false otherwise

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.StandardMaterialExport
member.summary: Converts URP/HDRP Lit and Built-In Standard shader based materials to glTF materials

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.StandardMaterialExport.ConvertMaterial(UnityEngine.Material,GLTFast.Schema.Material@,GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable,GLTFast.Logging.ICodeLogger)
member.summary: Converts a Unity material to a glTF material.
member.param: Associated IGltfWriter. Is used for adding images and textures.
member.returns: True if no errors occured, false otherwise

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.ManagedNativeArray`2
member.summary: Wraps a managed TIn[] in a NativeArray<TOut>without copying memory.
member.typeparam: Type of items in the input array.
Type of items in output NativeArray (might differ from input type TIn).

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ManagedNativeArray`2.#ctor(`0[])
member.summary: Wraps a managed TIn[] in a NativeArray<TOut>without copying memory.
member.param: The original TIn[] to convert into a NativeArray<TOut>

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.ManagedNativeArray`2.nativeArray
member.summary: Points to the managed NativeArray<TOut>.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ManagedNativeArray`2.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the managed NativeArray<TOut>.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.ManagedNativeArray`2.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the managed NativeArray<TOut> and unpins the underlying managed array.
member.param: Indicates whether the method call comes from a Dispose method (its value is true) or from a finalizer (its value is false).

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.GltfUnlitMaterialExporter
member.summary: Converts Unity Materials that use the glTFast shader `glTF/Unlit` to glTF materials

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExport
member.summary: Creates glTF files from GameObject hierarchies

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExport.#ctor(GLTFast.Export.ExportSettings,GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExportSettings,GLTFast.Export.IMaterialExport,GLTFast.IDeferAgent,GLTFast.Logging.ICodeLogger)
member.summary: Provides glTF export of GameObject based scenes and hierarchies.
member.param: Defer agent (<see cref="IDeferAgent"/>); decides when/if to preempt export to preserve a stable frame rate.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExport.AddScene(UnityEngine.GameObject[],System.String)
member.summary: Adds a scene to the glTF which consists of a collection of GameObjects.
member.param: GameObjects to be added (recursively) as root level nodes.
member.returns: True, if the scene was added flawlessly. False, otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExport.AddScene(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{UnityEngine.GameObject},Unity.Mathematics.float4x4,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a glTF scene from a collection of GameObjects. The GameObjects will be converted into glTF nodes. The nodes' positions within the glTF scene will be their GameObjects' world position transformed by the matrix, essentially allowing you to set an arbitrary scene center.
member.param: Root level GameObjects (will get added recursively)
Inverse scene origin matrix. This transform will be applied to all nodes.
member.returns: True if the scene was added successfully, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExport.SaveToFileAndDispose(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exports the collected scenes/content as glTF, writes it to a file and disposes this object. After the export this instance cannot be re-used!
member.param: Token to submit cancellation requests. The default value is None.
member.returns: True if the glTF file was created successfully, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.GameObjectExport.SaveToStreamAndDispose(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exports the collected scenes/content as glTF, writes it to a Stream and disposes this object. Only works for self-contained glTF-Binary. After the export this instance cannot be re-used!
member.param: Token to submit cancellation requests. The default value is None.
member.returns: True if the glTF file was written successfully, false otherwise

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.DracoExportSettings
member.summary: Settings for Draco mesh compression

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.DracoExportSettings.encodingSpeed
member.summary: Encoding speed level. 0 means slow and small. 10 is fastest.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.DracoExportSettings.decodingSpeed
member.summary: Decoding speed level. 0 means slow and small. 10 is fastest.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.DracoExportSettings.positionQuantization
member.summary: Positional quantization.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.DracoExportSettings.normalQuantization
member.summary: Normal quantization.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.DracoExportSettings.texCoordQuantization
member.summary: Texture coordinate quantization.

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.DracoExportSettings.colorQuantization
member.summary: Color quantization.

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.NormalImageExport
member.summary: Wrapper to export a glTF image normal map

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.NormalImageExport.#ctor(UnityEngine.Texture2D)
member.summary: Default constructor

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.GltfShaderGraphMaterialExporter
member.summary: Converts Unity Materials that use a glTFast Built-In shader to glTF materials

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.KhrLightsPunctual
member.summary: Provides conversion from Unity light components to glTF lights.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.KhrLightsPunctual.ConvertToLight(UnityEngine.Light)
member.summary: Converts a Unity light component to a glTF light.
member.returns: glTF light.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.KhrLightsPunctual.GetLightRange(UnityEngine.Light,UnityEngine.LightType)
member.summary: Retrieves the light's range. In Unity 2023.1 and older `Light.range` would return what now is , which is the range extended by a certain area light size factor. This method removes that addition in that case to get the original value that's shown in the inspector.
member.param: Actual light type (might differ from light.type in HDRP).
member.returns: The light's range.

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.OrmImageExport
member.summary: Exports a glTF ORM (occlusion/roughness/metallic) image map

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.OrmImageExport.#ctor(UnityEngine.Texture2D,UnityEngine.Texture2D,UnityEngine.Texture2D,GLTFast.Export.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Default constructor
member.param: Metal/Gloss texture, as used by Unity Lit/Standard materials
Occlusion texture, as used by Unity Lit/Standard materials
Smoothness texture, as used by Unity Lit/Standard materials

member.name: P:GLTFast.Export.OrmImageExport.HasOcclusion
member.summary: True if occlusion texture was set

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.OrmImageExport.EncodeOrmTexture(UnityEngine.Texture2D,UnityEngine.Texture2D,UnityEngine.Texture2D,GLTFast.Export.ImageFormat,System.Int32)
member.summary: Encodes ORM texture

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.BaseColorProperty
member.summary: _BaseColor shader property identifier

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.MainTexProperty
member.summary: _MainTex shader property identifier

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.ColorProperty
member.summary: _Color shader property identifier

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.MetallicProperty
member.summary: _Metallic shader property identifier

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.SmoothnessProperty
member.summary: _Smoothness shader property identifier

member.name: F:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.CutoffProperty
member.summary: _Cutoff shader property identifier

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.ConvertMaterial(UnityEngine.Material,GLTFast.Schema.Material@,GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable,GLTFast.Logging.ICodeLogger)
member.summary: Converts a Unity material into a glTF material
member.param: glTF to export material to. Will be used to add required texture images
member.returns: True if material was converted successfully, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.SetAlphaModeAndCutoff(UnityEngine.Material,GLTFast.Schema.Material)
member.summary: Applies alpha mode and cutoff
member.param: glTF material to apply settings on

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.IsDoubleSided(UnityEngine.Material,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves whether material is double-sided.
member.returns: True if material is double-sided, false otherwise.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.IsUnlit(UnityEngine.Material)
member.summary: Retrieves whether material is unlit
member.returns: True if material uses unlit shader, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.ExportUnlit(GLTFast.Schema.Material,UnityEngine.Material,System.Int32,GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable,GLTFast.Logging.ICodeLogger)
member.summary: Converts an unlit Unity material into a glTF material

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.GetUnlitColor(UnityEngine.Material,UnityEngine.Color@)
member.summary: Returns the color of an unlit material
member.returns: True if the unlit color was retrieved, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.ExportTextureInfo(UnityEngine.Texture,GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable,GLTFast.Export.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Export a Unity texture to a glTF.
member.returns: glTF texture info

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.ExportNormalTextureInfo(UnityEngine.Texture,UnityEngine.Material,GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable,System.Int32)
member.summary: Export a normal texture from Unity to glTF.
member.param: Material the normal is used on
member.returns: glTF texture info

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.MaterialExportBase.ExportTextureTransform(GLTFast.Schema.TextureInfoBase,UnityEngine.Material,System.Int32,GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable)
member.summary: Calculates a texture's transform and adds a KHR_texture_transform glTF extension, if required
member.param: Texture property to fetch transformation from
Context glTF to export to (for registering extension usage)

member.name: T:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable
member.summary: Is able to receive asset resources and export them to glTF

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddNode(System.Nullable{Unity.Mathematics.float3},System.Nullable{Unity.Mathematics.quaternion},System.Nullable{Unity.Mathematics.float3},System.UInt32[],System.String)
member.summary: Adds a node to the glTF
member.param: Local translation of the node (in Unity-space)
Local rotation of the node (in Unity-space)
Local scale of the node (in Unity-space)
Array of node indices that are parented to this newly created node
member.returns: glTF node index

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddMeshToNode(System.Int32,UnityEngine.Mesh,System.Int32[])
member.summary: Assigns a mesh to a previously added node
member.param: Index of the node to add the mesh to
Unity mesh to be assigned and exported
glTF materials IDs to be assigned (multiple in case of sub-meshes)

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddMeshToNode(System.Int32,UnityEngine.Mesh,System.Int32[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Assigns a mesh to a previously added node
member.param: Index of the node to add the mesh to
Unity mesh to be assigned and exported
glTF materials IDs to be assigned (multiple in case of sub-meshes)

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddMeshToNode(System.Int32,UnityEngine.Mesh,System.Int32[],System.UInt32[])
member.summary: Assigns a mesh to a previously added node
member.param: Index of the node to add the mesh to
Unity mesh to be assigned and exported
glTF materials IDs to be assigned (multiple in case of sub-meshes)
Node indices representing the joints of a skin.

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddCameraToNode(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Assigns a camera to a previously added node
member.param: Index of the node to add the mesh to
glTF camera ID to be assigned

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddLightToNode(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Assigns a light to a previously added node
member.param: Index of the node to add the mesh to
glTF light ID to be assigned

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddMaterial(UnityEngine.Material,System.Int32@,GLTFast.Export.IMaterialExport)
member.summary: Adds a Unity material
member.returns: True if converting and adding material was successful, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddImage(GLTFast.Export.ImageExportBase)
member.summary: Adds an ImageExport to the glTF and returns the resulting image index
member.returns: glTF image index

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddTexture(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a glTF texture from with a given image index
member.returns: glTF texture index

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddSampler(UnityEngine.FilterMode,UnityEngine.TextureWrapMode,UnityEngine.TextureWrapMode)
member.summary: Creates a glTF sampler based on Unity filter and wrap settings
member.param: Texture wrap mode in U direction
Texture wrap mode in V direction
member.returns: glTF sampler index or -1 if no sampler is required

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddCamera(UnityEngine.Camera,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Creates a glTF camera based on a Unity camera
member.returns: True if camera was successfully created, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddLight(UnityEngine.Light,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Creates a glTF light based on a Unity light Uses the KHR_lights_punctual extension.
member.returns: True if light was successfully created, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.AddScene(System.UInt32[],System.String)
member.summary: Adds a scene to the glTF
member.returns: glTF scene index

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.RegisterExtensionUsage(GLTFast.Extension,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Registers the use of a glTF extension
member.param: True if extension is required and used. False if it's used only

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.SaveToFileAndDispose(System.String)
member.summary: Exports the collected scenes/content as glTF, writes it to a file and disposes this object. After the export this instance cannot be re-used!
member.returns: True if the glTF file was created successfully, false otherwise

member.name: M:GLTFast.Export.IGltfWritable.SaveToStreamAndDispose(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Exports the collected scenes/content as glTF, writes it to a Stream and disposes this object. Only works for self-contained glTF-Binary. After the export this instance cannot be re-used!
member.returns: True if the glTF file was created successfully, false otherwise
